items.message: [bayesian-calibration-audit] Bayesian calibration audit: run `python3 tools/bayes_meta.py --json > experiments/meta/bayes-meta-s<N>.json` — compute Bayesian posteriors for all frontiers, ECE, publication bias, replication inconsistencies. Target: ECE <0.15 (current 0.159 at S432). 27 overconfident frontiers (<3 exps). Publication bias NEUTRAL. (L-903, tools/bayes_meta.py) (every ~15 sessions, last: S490)
1 active dispatch lane(s) have no active coordinator lane: DOMEX-GENESIS-S520
